sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5589" key="a)mulidwto/n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμυλιδωτόν</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, kind of <sense id="n5589.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tunic,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0252.tlg001:2D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hermipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2D.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
